eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Randall, TX; at 07:21 PM ON MAY 15, 2026 Effective until 08:21 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Amarillo Area Office of Emergency Management: The evacuation has been lifted from I-27 east to Palo Duro Canyon, between Cemetery and Hungate. Roads may be blocked or congested, so plan your route accordingly. Check social media for updates. Stay informed via local news or official channels.
